action.reasoning: Observation: Both large UNet and FNO overfit severely - val loss plateaus at 0.027 while train loss drops to 0.003. Best result was small UNet at epoch 5 (val_loss=0.0219, rmse_z500=479). Analysis: The model learns climatological mean quickly then overfits. Key insight: predict RESIDUAL (delta from last input step) instead of absolute values - this forces the model to learn the change, which is smaller in magnitude and may generalize better. Also try: (1) smaller model base_ch=64, (2) stronger dropout=0.3, (3) higher weight decay=1e-3, (4) lower LR=2e-4, (5) longer training with cosine annealing. The residual approach is standard in NWP ML models. Decision: Implement residual prediction UNet with strong regularization.
action.command: NUM_EPOCHS=50 BASE_CH=64 DROPOUT=0.2 LR=2e-4 WEIGHT_DECAY=1e-3 RESIDUAL=1 python train.py
